skill.name: git-master
skill.author: code-yeongyu
skill.description: MUST USE for ANY git operations. Atomic commits, rebase/squash, history search (blame, bisect, log -S). STRONGLY RECOMMENDED: Use with task(category='quick', load_skills=['git-master'], ...) to save context. Triggers: 'commit', 'rebase', 'squash', 'who wrote', 'when was X added', 'find the commit that'.
